    B

    bsf() - Method in class generation.characters.Hunter
    Runs BFS from the Hunter's current position toward the player.

    C

    Cell - Class in generation.map
    Represents a single cell in the game map grid.
    Cell(int[], String, boolean) - Constructor for class generation.map.Cell
    Constructs a new Cell.
    Character - Class in generation.characters
    Abstract base class for all characters in the game (player and enemies).
    Character(String, int, int[]) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Character
    Constructs a Character with the given name, lives, and starting position.
    chooseMovement() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Decides the next movement for this character.
    chooseMovement() - Method in class generation.characters.Enemy
    Chooses a random direction (UP, DOWN, LEFT, or RIGHT — never NONE).
    chooseMovement() - Method in class generation.characters.Ghost
    Returns the Ghost's current committed direction without any randomness.
    chooseMovement() - Method in class generation.characters.Hunter
    Determines the next move by running BFS and converting the first-step cell into a Movement direction.
    chooseMovement() - Method in class generation.characters.Player
    Reads a single character from stdin and maps it to a Movement direction.

    D

    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Move one row down (y = +1).

    E

    Enemy - Class in generation.characters
    Represents a basic enemy (Zombie) that moves randomly each turn.
    Enemy(String, int, int[]) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Enemy
    Constructs a new Enemy with the given name, lives, and starting position.
    equals(Object) - Method in class generation.characters.Player
     
    equals(Object) - Method in class generation.map.Cell
     

    G

    game - module game
     
    game - package game
     
    Game - Class in game
    Main game class that manages the game loop and level transitions.
    Game(String[], String) - Constructor for class game.Game
    Constructs a new Game instance.
    generation - package generation
     
    generation.characters - package generation.characters
     
    generation.map - package generation.map
     
    getCols() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the number of columns in the map.
    getEnemies() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the list of all enemies in this level.
    getEnemyAt(int, int) - Method in class generation.Level
    Returns the enemy at position (i, j), or null if none is present.
    getGameOn() - Method in class game.Game
    Checks if the game is currently running.
    getHasCoin() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
    Checks whether this cell contains a coin.
    getInitialPosition() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Gets the initial spawn position.
    getLives() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Gets the current number of lives.
    getMap() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the map grid.
    getMovement() - Method in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Returns the movement offsets as an array.
    getName() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Gets the character's name.
    getNumberOfCoins() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the current number of coins remaining.
    getNumberOfLevels() - Static method in class generation.Level
    Gets the total number of levels created.
    getNumberOfPlayers() - Static method in class generation.characters.Player
    Gets the total number of players instantiated.
    getPlayer() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the player instance.
    getPosition() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Gets the current grid position.
    getPosition() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
    Gets the grid coordinates of this cell.
    getRequiredKey() - Method in class generation.map.LockedDoor
    Gets the key required to unlock this door.
    getRows() - Method in class generation.Level
    Gets the number of rows in the map.
    getScore() - Method in class generation.characters.Player
    Gets the player's current score.
    getType() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
    Gets the type of this cell.
    Ghost - Class in generation.characters
    Represents a Ghost enemy that moves in a straight line and ignores obstacles.
    Ghost(String, int, int[]) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Ghost
    Constructs a new Ghost with the given name, lives, and starting position.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
     
    Hunter - Class in generation.characters
    Represents a Hunter enemy that actively pursues the player using BFS pathfinding.
    Hunter(String, int, int[]) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Hunter
    Constructs a new Hunter with the given name, lives, and starting position.

    I

    initialPosition - Variable in class generation.characters.Character
    Spawn position used when resetting after a collision or trap.
    isEnemyAt(int, int) - Method in class generation.Level
    Checks in O(1) whether any enemy occupies the cell at (i, j).
    isLocked() - Method in class generation.map.LockedDoor
    Checks whether the door is currently locked.

    L

    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Move one column to the left (x = -1).
    Level - Class in generation
    Represents a game level, managing the map, player movement, and game rules.
    Level(String, Player) - Constructor for class generation.Level
    Constructs a new Level from a file.
    lives - Variable in class generation.characters.Character
    Number of lives remaining.
    LockedDoor - Class in generation.map
    Represents a locked door cell in the game map.
    LockedDoor(int[], String) - Constructor for class generation.map.LockedDoor
    Constructs a new LockedDoor at the given position.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class game.Game
    Main entry point for the game.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class generation.characters.Player
    Main method for testing Player class functionality independently.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class generation.Level
    Entry point for testing the Level class independently.
    move(Movement, Cell[][]) - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Moves the character in the given direction, wrapping around map edges.
    Movement - Enum Class in generation.map
    Enum representing the possible movement directions for the player.

    N

    name - Variable in class generation.characters.Character
    Display name of this character.
    nextLevel() - Method in class game.Game
    Advances the game to the next level.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
    No movement (y = 0, x = 0).

    P

    Player - Class in generation.characters
    Represents a player in the game with score, lives, and position.
    Player(int[], String, int) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Player
    Constructs a new Player.
    position - Variable in class generation.characters.Character
    Current grid position {row, col}.

    R

    resetEnemies() - Method in class generation.Level
    Resets all enemies to their initial positions and rebuilds the occupied cells set.
    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Move one column to the right (x = +1).

    S

    setDirection(Movement) - Method in class generation.characters.Ghost
    Sets the Ghost's current movement direction.
    setGameOn(boolean) - Method in class game.Game
    Sets the game state.
    setInitialPosition(int[]) - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Sets the initial spawn position used when resetting.
    setLives(int) - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Sets the number of lives, clamping negative values to 0.
    setMap(String[]) - Method in class generation.Level
    Initializes the map from string array.
    setNumberOfCoins(int) - Method in class generation.Level
    Sets the number of coins.
    setPosition(int[]) - Method in class generation.characters.Character
    Sets the current position.
    setScore(int) - Method in class generation.characters.Player
    Sets the player's score.
    setTarget(Player) - Method in class generation.characters.Ghost
    Sets the player target used to compute interception direction.
    setTarget(Player, Cell[][]) - Method in class generation.characters.Hunter
    Sets the player target and map reference before each movement decision.

    T

    toString() - Method in class generation.characters.Player
     
    toString() - Method in class generation.Level
    Returns a full string representation of the level for console display.
    toString() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
    Returns the character representation of this cell for console display.

    U

    unlock() - Method in class generation.map.LockedDoor
    Unlocks the door, making it passable.
    UP - Enum constant in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Move one row up (y = -1).
    update() - Method in class generation.Level
    Updates the game state based on player input.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class generation.map.Movement
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    Wall - Class in generation.map
    Represents an impassable wall cell in the game map.
    Wall(int[]) - Constructor for class generation.map.Wall
    Constructs a new Wall cell at the given position.
